Happy Birthday, My Dearest Karma! ❤️🎂

My beautiful girl, you are my greatest blessing, my biggest joy,

Watching you grow into such a kind, smart, and wonderful person makes me so proud to be your mom.

wish you a life filled with happiness, love, laughter, good health, and beautiful dreams that all come true

Never stop believing in yourself.No matter how big you grow, you will always be my little girl, my sunshine

May this new year of your life bring you amazing adventures, wonderful friends, and countless reasons to smile.

Happy Birthday, my sweet Karma! 🎉💖

I love you more than words can ever express. Today, tomorrow, and forever.

Love always,

Your Mom ❤️
